title: Rebranding the 55th Public Affairs Company
summary: A strategic rebrand plan for the 55th PA Company's transition from Combat Camera to a public affairs mission set — repositioning the unit's voice on Instagram, X, and DVIDS while preserving its visual heritage.

title: Escape from Tarkov — Six-Month Content Marketing Campaign
summary: A six-month owned, paid, and earned media plan for Battlestate Games' Escape from Tarkov — Twitch Drops, creator partnerships, and KPI dashboards built around game wipes and version 1.0 launch.

title: Rainbow Six Siege — Community-Driven Social Strategy
summary: A platform-by-platform social plan for Ubisoft's Rainbow Six Siege leveraging operator launches, esports moments, and Reddit/X community ritual to deepen engagement around destructible-environment gameplay.

title: Tarkov v1.0 Launch Trailer — Narrative Analysis
summary: Analysis of the cinematic Escape from Tarkov 1.0 storyline trailer — how lore, PMC factions, and questline reveals turn a launch asset into long-form branded narrative across YouTube and social.

title: Razer & UGC — "For Gamers. By Gamers."
summary: Examines how Razer harnesses player clips, screenshots, and live reactions as citizen-style brand reporting — and what hardware brands can borrow from creator-led storytelling.

title: Randy's Army Navy Surplus — Veteran-Owned Local Brand Plan
summary: Social audit and growth plan for a veteran-owned military surplus shop near Fort Meade — turning niche tactical inventory into a discoverable, story-led brand for Soldiers and collectors.

title: Tarkov Audience Promotion Objectives
summary: Defines a 15% lift target for sales, Twitch viewership, and Discord membership for Escape from Tarkov by reaching FPS extraction-shooter players 18–34 across NA & EU.

title: Live Sports & the Second Screen
summary: A study of second-screen behavior during live sports broadcasts and how brands can build real-time, interactive moments through mobile-first social activations.

title: VR & AR in Brand Experience — IKEA Place
summary: How IKEA's AR Place app reduces purchase anxiety by letting buyers stage furniture in their homes before checkout — a case for AR as a confidence-building sales tool.

title: AI Tools for Social Media Managers
summary: How tools like ChatGPT reshape the social manager's day — content ideation, caption writing, sentiment analysis, and calendar building — and where human judgment still wins.

title: Salesforce "The Vault" with MrBeast — Super Bowl LX
summary: Critique of Salesforce's 2026 Super Bowl spot built with MrBeast — a $1M vault as launchpad for an owned-media experience that outlives the broadcast.
